steps.title: Identify the pivot
steps.content: The first sentence says Kepler-296e may be habitable but is too far away for humanity to use soon. The next sentence shifts to a different course of action: focusing on planets in our solar system.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: A signals similarity, but the second sentence changes direction. C signals an example, not an alternative. D signals sequence, not replacement of one focus with another. The remaining transition marks the pivot. The answer is B.
